emotional_tone: Reverent, peaceful, ancient-yet-modern, authoritative but accessible, contemplative

rules: No generic sans-serif (Inter, Roboto) for headings.
Use Cormorant Garamond for all section titles and sacred text titles.
Use Lora exclusively for long-form reading (Bible, Catechism, Daily Readings).
Use Outfit for app navigation, buttons, dates, and metadata.
Never use pure black or pure white. Always tint toward warm stone/sand.
Wine Red (#8B2635) is the primary interactive color (CTAs, active tabs, Favorites icon).
Gold (#D4AF37) is used sparingly for accents, like active reading indicators or subtle dividers.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Treat UI like an ancient manuscript with wide margins.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Control Room mode) for the Dashboard, but with warm, tactile surfaces instead of technical ones.
spacing_and_layout.reading_view: All reading interfaces (Bible, Readings, Prayers) MUST be restricted to max-w-2xl or max-w-3xl, centered, with massive vertical padding (py-16 to py-24).
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align text for high readability.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use p-6 to p-12 inside cards. Never cram text to the borders.

surfaces.style: Neumorphism (Tactile Clay & Crisp) mixed with Flat Editorial.
surfaces.cards: Flat background (Pale Sand #F2EFE9), 1px subtle border (#E7E5E4), NO heavy shadows. On hover, slight lift and border darkens.
surfaces.headers: Solid background (#FBF9F6) with a hard bottom border (#E7E5E4). No glassmorphism as it feels too 'clinical/tech' for a spiritual app.
surfaces.border_radius: Subtle roundness: rounded-md or rounded-none for a print/book aesthetic.

components.buttons: Outfit font. Solid Wine Red for primary, Ghost/Outline with Wine Red text for secondary.
components.navigation: Top or left-side nav using pure HTML/Tailwind. Highlight active state with a Wine Red text color and left border.
components.tabs: Use Shadcn tabs but strip the Vercel look. Make them look like editorial section dividers (underline style).
components.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (Duotone weight) for a high-end, elegant look.

media.description: Stained glass church interior for the authentication or landing page hero section.
High-resolution vintage parchment texture to be used at low opacity (10-20%) over the base background for added tactile feel.
Close-up of an open Bible for the Bible or Daily Readings header banner.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast ratio is met. Stone 900 on Pale Sand passes easily.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Animations should be subtle fades (opacity) and slight transforms, no bouncing.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (Favorites toggle, language switch, nav links, reading selectors) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'favorite-button', 'lang-toggle-en').

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind with the exact colors from this JSON (base, surface, primary, etc.).
Import Cormorant Garamond, Lora, and Outfit from Google Fonts.
Build a bilingual toggle (ES/EN) in the header. The default should be ES since the sources are Spanish.
The Dashboard must feature a Bento Grid linking to: Today's Readings, Liturgy of the Hours, Prayers, Examen, News, Bible, Catechism, and Favorites.
For the 'Examen of conscience' section, build an upload UI or placeholder reader since the PDFs will be provided later.
Use the provided image URLs strictly. Apply a Wine Red or Stone 900 overlay (bg-stone-900/40) over images if text sits on top.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn Cards with heavy shadows. Override them to have bg-[#F2EFE9] and border-[#E7E5E4] with no shadow.
All text reading views must be optimized for long sessions: max-w-3xl, text-lg or text-xl Lora font, leading-loose, text-[#1C1917].
